retrieved_result: How many liters are there in 130 ounces? Charlie N. 122,923 Contributions I have spent many years renovating buildings and leading a commercial handyman crew. How many liters are there in 130 ounces?130 ounces is approximately 3.685 litres. Roy Forssberg 371,424 Contributions130 ml how many grams? Only if you have pure water in mind: 130 m
